title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese describes four strategies Anthropic's Growth Team employed to scale rapidly: automating existing workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building custom tools, and using AI as a thought partner. He also highlights a common ceiling where AI work becomes burdensome rather than leveraged.
